name: amazon-seller-partner
description: Reads Amazon Selling Partner API orders, FBA inventory summaries, and financial event groups via Login with Amazon (LWA) authentication.

risk.read: external Amazon Selling Partner API read of order, inventory, and financial data

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/paritytest/amazon-seller-partner (the AuthHook's real LWA refresh_token-grant path, x-amz-access-token header, and full read/pagination/incremental behavior against a real test SP-API server) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real lwa_token_url and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all (the hook would POST to the literal string "synthetic-conformance-value"), so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
